name: CE Agents Monorepo
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'cd "CE - Agent Builder" && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -e ".[dev]" && cd "../CE - Multi-Agent Orchesration" && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd "../CE - Evals" && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -e .'
